string 2: We have to go after Coo!
I don't think this is the right way...

What if we filled the hole with water? Then, maybe we could
operate that sluice gate from somewhere...

It's closed... Maybe there is a place where we can power up
the shutter with electrcity like Coo did.

Hey, doesn't it look like this machine is connected to the
shutter? If we could somehow jump-start it...
That's a big sluice gate. I can hear water...

The mysterious creature is escaping! It seems to be injured,
so I'd like to try to help it.

The creature was startled by the noise and ran off! The
chase continues!

It seems that certain types of Digimon recognize something
they've never seen before as an enemy, no questions asked.

These hostile Digimon are harmful to humans, but... Digimon
born through conversion do not exhibit such hostile factors.

The Shinjuku underground is a den of hostile Digimon. The target we're
tracking shows different attributes. Maybe we can get some valid data.

We're so close to helping that mysterious creature. Now,
let's bring this investigation to a close!

What?! How is that even possible?! Oh, just let us catch
you, already! I promise we won't hurt you!

Our pursuit of that mysterious creature is taking us in
deeper! Soon, we'll uncover its true identity!
It sounds like there's a battle going on.

Someone could be fighting on the other side of that door!
C'mon! We've gotta go save them!

Huh...?! This door won't open! Isn't there any other way
in?!

We've gotta find another route, and fast! Whoever you are
in there, just hang on!

This door won't open! We need to find another way in!
Hurry!

I can hear someone's voice through this duct! It must be
connected to that room!

I'll go in. We've gotta act fast to save those people
inside!
BlackGatomon can probably fit, too. C'mon. Let's go!
Damn it... We're done for!

We can't give up so easily. If we retreat, it'll be the end
of this city...!
I know that...! But what are we supposed to do?!

You're... that BlackGatomon from before! Did you just save
us...?

I knew Dr. Simmons was interacting with Digimon, but I
never imagined one would help people...

It's still hard to believe, but... for now, we'd better
just deal with the issue at hand.
Anyway... what are you guys doing here?

You got some batteries from Dr. Simmons, huh? The generator
is flooded right now because of the Digimon's rampage.

Well, we can't have much time. Help me operate the sluice
gate.
Use the control panel to operate the sluice gate.
Look! The door's open! They did it!

I did a quick check and the generator here looks fine. And
I loaded the battery, so it should start without a problem.

I don't know what would've happened if it weren't for you
guys...

Um... I was a little surprised earlier... but I wanted to
thank you for helping me.

You're a little different from the other BlackGatomon that
were pulling pranks.

I noticed there was one of you that seemed to be interested
in us... Was that you?

Um... I was a little surprised earlier... but I wanted to
thank you for helping me.

You're a little different from the other BlackGatomon that
were pulling pranks.

I noticed there was one of you that seemed to be interested
in us... Was that you?

Tell me all about it when we're done with this mission,
okay? For now, I'm off to activate the next generator.

In which case, we'd better get moving. We need to get all
the devices activated before it's too late!
We're here to rescue you! We'll fight by your side!
What?! But you're... Never mind. I appreciate the help!

This is just about the last place I'd expect to be
evacuating civilians...

Huh? You, there! This area's off limits. I'm going to need
all of you to take refuge back there in the square.

I heard from Dr. Simmons that we'd be getting backup,
but... YOU'RE the reinforcements?

And that behind you is... a Digimon? I heard about that,
too, but...

Well, I guess we can't get too picky in this situation. I
appreciate the help.
A huge door blocks the way forward.
Maybe a Digimon's power could open it?
Sorry. My knees just gave out... You guys go on ahead.
Let's hurry and go find my daughter. Please.

The footprints end here. I'm sure that kid must be up
ahead!
With that big door closed, what if we can't get back...?
We gotta find a way!

Oh, that's right! There's that manhole we used before to
get out near the government building.
Perfect. Let's hurry!
Let's head to that door from earlier.
I knew it! The footprints lead off that way.
Found him! Over there!
We need to follow his footprints!

I don't like this. It's too quiet. No sign of Digimon
anywhere.
Something about this feels... wrong. We'd better hurry.
Is the electromagnetic net generator still functional...?
Well, that's a relief. It hasn't been completely destroyed.
Looks like those two were able to keep it safe.
I'll call in a medical team right away to take care of them.

We should be able to get the generator working with
a few repairs.
I'll do it myself. We can't let their efforts go to waste.
But I need a special tool in order to perform the repairs.
So I'm going to have to ask for your help again.
Our base is in Higashi-Shinjuku.
Can you go there and get that tool for me?

I'll stay here and start working on whatever other repairs
I can.
It's dangerous, I know, but... it has to be done.

Hm? What's with that Digimon? Are they trying to say
something?
They're saying they want to stay here and help!

W, well... I guess they can stick around if they want.
Just as long as they don't get in my way.

Sorry. I... I'm not used to being in such close proximity
to Digimon...

Anyway, let's get started. Head over to Higashi-Shinjuku
and get that tool for me, okay?
I think I'm beginning to understand Digimon a little better.

Well, perhaps not so much about Digimon, but... about this
specific one.

This one is different from other Digimon. It feels like
this Digimon is... special, somehow.
Digimon are attacking! We have to go help, now!

BlackGatomon's injured! They tried to protect me,
but now they're hurt...!
Don't worry! I'm on it!

BlackGatomon should be all right for now, but will
need to get some proper medical treatment later.
Good... Thank you.
Now it's time for me to do my part. Can I have that tool?
*activation sound*

Now that the generator's activated, this place is safe.
All the Digimon in the area should be gone.
I'll take BlackGatomon to Dr. Simmons.

They need rest and proper treatment. They're... my
guardian angel, after all.
You should be getting a call from Dr. Simmons soon.
...You've been a huge help. I'm very grateful.

I didn't think hostile Digimon could change to that extent.
According to the latest report from the research department...

...their hostile nature seems to be from an intense defensive instinct.
Like antibodies in an overreacting immune system, it says.

If Digimon are the antibodies, then are we the foreign substance...
perhaps because we learned the principles of time?

I analyzed the surrounding communications. Dr. Simmons is
at the Waterfall Plaza of Shinjuku Park. Try going there.
BlackGatomon! Are you okay?!
Oh no! I'm on it!
They keep on going to the other side! Let's go under!
I'm sensing something up ahead!
I knew it! The footprints lead off that way!
There...! Huh? The trail ends here. Where could they have gone?

According to the logs, this isn't the first time you've been
to this aqueduct. It must've been when comms were down.

I wonder why so many hostile Digimon are concentrated in
the Shinjuku underground. Is it a sign of more anomalies?

I can see a disturbance in the magnetic field nearby.
That's suspicious. I'll mark the map so you can check it out.

Footprints...? Now that you mention it, I think I can just
barely make them out. You've got good eyes, Aegiomon.

I feel stronger when I'm with BlackGatomon than when I'm
alone.

Just being together makes me feel safe, like I can rely on
it.

Funny, isn't it? I've never felt this way toward my human
coworkers...

...I'll go from this side. You guys circle around from the
other side, 'kay?
A huge door blocks the way forward.
Maybe a Digimon's power could open it?
It's dangerous past this point. Please stay back.
Oh, you're the ones working with the doctor! Have a look at this...

It looks like... the shell of a Digimon egg. A Digimon must've
hatched out of it.

It doesn't seem to be here in the underground square anymore,
but, still, we shouldn't let our guards down...
You folks stay sharp, too. No telling what kind of monster's afoot.

The shell of the Egg of the Great Guardian. Its dull glow
hasn't faded.
